data.body: Remediated the current plan-review BLOCK (2 findings). E6/F1: AC now makes tests/unit/test_ruff_ratchet.py recursively scan src/rebar Python files and fail on the literal datetime.UTC token, with pytest -q tests/unit/test_ruff_ratchet.py as the proving command. E4: replaced the DTZ005-invalid _dt.datetime.now().astimezone().date() prescription with _dt.datetime.now(tz=_dt.timezone.utc).astimezone().date(), preserving host-local calendar-date semantics while passing tz= to now(). Also split compound config/deferred-scope ACs, added the previously orphaned S/Semgrep assertions to Approach, and specified POSIX/macOS time.tzset test behavior plus the unsupported-platform skip. Current-base Ruff probe still reports exactly DTZ006, DTZ007, and DTZ011. check-ac passes with 16 items, quality-check passes, and clarity-check scores 5/5. Fresh signed review required.
